creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Mon Jan  5 09:15:58 UTC 2015
New revision: 376284
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/376284

Log:
  New port: science/mcstas

  Monte Carlo ray tracing simulations of neutron experiments.

  McStas is a tool for simulating neutron instrumentation and experiments
  using a ray-tracing formalism. Currently the main use of McStas is
  in the field of instrument design.

  WWW: http://www.mcstas.org

  PR:		194846
  Submitted by:	Erik B. Knudsen <erkn@fysik.dtu.dk>

Changes:

  head/science/mcstas/
  head/science/mcstas/Makefile
  head/science/mcstas/distinfo
  head/science/mcstas/pkg-deinstall
  head/science/mcstas/pkg-descr
  head/science/mcstas/pkg-install
  head/science/mcstas/pkg-plist
